heading: Expressions
body:
A constant expression allows a [constant](scoring-constant)
number in the function score. For example, you can use
`constant` to modify relevance ranking through a numeric value
from a data enrichment pipeline. It must include the following
option:

| Option   | Type  | Description                                                                   |
| -------- | ----- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| constant | float | Number that indicates a fixed value. MongoDB Search supports negative values. |

> **Example:** 
>
> ```sh
> {
>   "function": {
>     "constant": -23.78
>   }
> }
> ```
